item.title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
item.description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage and the work needed to keep equipment moving.

media:content.media:title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage and the work needed to keep equipment moving.

item.title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
item.description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage, with a look at the repair work and keeping equipment ready for the next job.

media:content.media:title: Purple Pete Takes Some Damage
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shows Purple Pete after taking some damage, with a look at the repair work and keeping equipment ready for the next job.

item.title: Brody’s First Acre of the Year
item.description: Brody gets the first acre of the year underway in Episode 2, marking the start of another season of field work at Larson Farms.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s First Acre of the Year
media:content.media:description: Brody gets the first acre of the year underway in Episode 2, marking the start of another season of field work at Larson Farms.

item.title: 10,000 Pounds of Cement in a Tight Spot
item.description: Moving 10,000 pounds of cement into a tight spot on the farm takes careful equipment work and steady handling.

media:content.media:title: 10,000 Pounds of Cement in a Tight Spot
media:content.media:description: Moving 10,000 pounds of cement into a tight spot on the farm takes careful equipment work and steady handling.

item.title: A Tough Call in the Field
item.description: A farm decision didn’t go as planned, showing the realities of field work and the importance of making the right call at the right time.

media:content.media:title: A Tough Call in the Field
media:content.media:description: A farm decision didn’t go as planned, showing the realities of field work and the importance of making the right call at the right time.

item.title: Double-Decker Load at Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms shows a double-decker load in action, keeping the work moving with practical farm equipment and steady field-side handling.

media:content.media:title: Double-Decker Load at Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shows a double-decker load in action, keeping the work moving with practical farm equipment and steady field-side handling.

item.title: This Will Be The Year on Larson Farms
item.description: Larson Farms shares a simple message for the season: this will be the year. A straightforward look at farm life and the work ahead.

media:content.media:title: This Will Be The Year on Larson Farms
media:content.media:description: Larson Farms shares a simple message for the season: this will be the year. A straightforward look at farm life and the work ahead.

item.title: New Salford Arrives on Yard #7
item.description: A new Salford shows up on Yard #7, ready for farm work and the next round of field prep.

media:content.media:title: New Salford Arrives on Yard #7
media:content.media:description: A new Salford shows up on Yard #7, ready for farm work and the next round of field prep.
